data.title: Expect SOL to approach $95-$105 by March following technical consolidation. Short-term: $88-$92, Medium-term: $95-$105, Critical support: $80.17.
data.description: Predictions for the SOL prices are as follows: in the short term (1 week), it is anticipated to range between $88 and $92. Moving on to the medium term (1 month), the forecast suggests a range of $95 to $105. The bullish breakout level is identified at $93.75, whereas the critical support level stands at $80.17. These predictions provide insights for investors to strategize their actions in the dynamic cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Animoca Brands expands in Middle East with Dubai crypto license, approved on Feb. 5, targeting institutional investors under VARA oversight.
data.description: On February 5th, the regulatory body in Dubai granted Animoca Brands approval for a license. This license permits the company to cater to institutional and qualified investors under the supervision of Dubai's VARA.

data.title: DOGE aims $0.12 rebound in short term despite technical weakness. Targets: $0.11 (1 week), $0.11-$0.12 (1 month), support $0.09.
data.description: Summary of DOGE Price Prediction: In the short term (1 week), the target price is estimated to be $0.11. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecast falls within the range of $0.11 to $0.12. A bullish breakout is anticipated once the price hits $0.12. It is crucial for the currency to maintain support at $0.09 to avoid significant declines.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong says retail users are buying the dip in Bitcoin and Ethereum, showing resilience.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong noted that despite the ongoing market downturn, retail users on the cryptocurrency exchange, numbered in the tens of thousands, have displayed strong resilience by consistently buying Bitcoin and Ethereum during price drops. Armstrong highlighted a significant increase in the number of native Bitcoin and Ethereum units held by retail users on the platform. He emphasized their unwavering commitment by stating, "They've been purchasing at lower prices and holding strong, with the vast majority having as many or more units in February compared to December." Our data reveals that retail users on Coinbase have remained steadfast, with most continuing to accumulate digital assets and maintain their positions during market fluctuations. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete story.

data.title: Aker BP partners with Aker Solutions for 5-year MMO services contract on Norwegian shelf from March 1, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Lysaker, Norway, recently announced on February 16, 2026, that Aker BP has granted Aker Solutions a significant long-term contract for Maintenance, Modification, and Operation (MMO) services for all Aker BP-operated assets in the Norwegian continental shelf. This five-year agreement will commence on March 1, 2026.

data.title: Renée Rädler named Chief People Officer of Hexagon AB as of Apr. 1, 2026, reporting to Anders Svensson.
data.description: Hexagon AB revealed on February 16, 2026, that Renée Rädler has been chosen as the new Chief People Officer (CPO) of the company. The appointment is effective from April 1, 2026. Renée will be a part of Hexagon's Executive Management Team and will be reporting directly to Anders Svensson, marking a significant move within the company's leadership.

data.title: Paratus Energy (PLSV) to announce unaudited Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 27, 2026, around 07:00 (CEST). Audio webcast available.
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda on February 16, 2026, Paratus Energy Services Ltd. (stock symbol: PLSV) announced that they will be unveiling their unaudited interim financial results for Q4 of 2025 on February 27, 2026, around 07:00 (CEST). Alongside the earnings disclosure, an audio webcast will also be available for investors and stakeholders.

data.title: BNB price at $615 signals oversold with RSI at 28.02, eyeing recovery to $680 by March 2026. Support seen at $750.
data.description: The Binance Coin (BNB) is currently indicating oversold signals as it is priced at $615 with a relative strength index (RSI) of 28.02. Technical analysis is pointing towards a potential rebound in the short-term, with a target range of $680-$700, and in the medium-term aiming for $750, as the coin tests its support levels.

data.title: Mantle deploys ERC-8004 on mainnet, introducing trust & identity layer for transforming AI.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on February 16, 2026, Mantle, a provider of high-performance distribution and liquidity services for real-world assets, revealed the launch of the ERC-8004 standard on mainnet. This development signifies the implementation of a dedicated trust and identity layer aimed at enhancing AI technology.

data.title: 128 Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric announces local & independent ownership in Chelmsford, with no plans to sell.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, in Chelmsford, Massachusetts, Ryan Williams, President of 128 Plumbing, Heating, Cooling & Electric, has consistently addressed inquiries about whether the company has been sold, responding with a firm "no". In the current environment, industries such as HVAC, plumbing, and electrical services have experienced significant growth, with 128 Plumbing being at the forefront of this trend. This company remains independent and thriving, with no plans for acquisition.(Character count: 94)
